goal: Continue project hardening by reducing lint blockers in active runtime files and quarantining legacy battle component lint debt without deleting code.
constraints: Do not change active gameplay behavior in BattleV2 or story flow.
Keep fixes low-risk: typing cleanup, lint hygiene, and deterministic dependency declarations only.
Legacy modules may be lint-ignored only when not imported by active flow.
deliverables: Active-path lint errors fixed (no-explicit-any, prefer-const, irregular-whitespace, unused vars).
React-hook and react-refresh warnings in active files resolved.
Legacy battle component directory lint debt isolated via eslint ignore patterns.
Validation rerun and workflow finalize pass.
